strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience spanning Node.js/TypeScript, React, and multiple backend languages — well beyond the 6+ year bar
Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks — matching the JD's AI agent requirement
Demonstrated craftsmanship culture: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE Capital, plus authored a D testing library (Fluent-Asserts) and runner (Trial)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Kotlin is not mentioned among the listed languages, though Java and broad polyglot fluency are present
Vitest is not explicitly named, though Jest-era testing expertise and a deep testing background are evident

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React depth across senior roles
Testing and software craftsmanship track record (TDD, CI/CD, own test tooling)

response.justification: Aisha brings well over a decade of senior full-stack delivery across TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker — exactly the primary stack the role demands — combined with current, hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq that directly answers the JD's AI agent requirement. Her track record at Optilyz, RIDE, and Dunnhumby shows scale, reliability, and craftsmanship (TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD), and her polyglot background (Java, Python-adjacent ecosystems, D, C/C++) signals strong adaptability to Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin where needed. The combination of architectural breadth, AI-agent fluency, and demonstrated teaching/community work makes her a strong fit for a senior IC building internal automation tooling.
